Headline: Kimball- Bound Brown Line Delays
ShortDescription: Kimball- Bound Brown Line trains are running w/residual delays following due a police investigation at Belmont. Service is resuming, allow extra time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Kimball- Bound Brown Line trains are running w/residual delays following due a police investigation at Belmont.

Board/exit all Brown Line trains on the Howard- bound Red Line side of the platform at Belmont.

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes or using buses to other rail lines.

These may include:

#22 Clark

#8 Halsted

#152 Addison

Trains are moving and crews are working to restore normal service.

Allow extra travel time.
